title: limeum pterocarpum
intro: Limeum pterocarpum, also known as the "Indian snakeroot," is a plant species that belongs to the family Capparaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Limeum pterocarpum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and treat various skin conditions. Limeum pterocarpum can be prepared as a herbal decoction or infusion, which is often used to treat various ailments, making it a valuable component in traditional medicine.
